key_evidence: Enkrypt AI found Pixtral models 60x more likely to generate CSAM than OpenAI GPT-4o and 40x more likely to produce CBRN weapons instructions
68% of adversarial prompts elicited unsafe content from Mistral models
Root cause identified as insufficient post-training safety alignment tuning
Mistral partnered with Thorn for child safety but did not pull models from availability
Independent third-party testing (Tier 5 evidence) from Enkrypt AI confirmed through multiple media outlets
